CancelFHIRExportJobWithDelete.description: Grants permission to cancel an on going FHIR Export job with Delete

ConfirmAttributionList.description: Grants permission to allow customers to indicate to a Producer that the Consumer does not have any more changes to be made to the Attribution List

CreateFHIRDatastore.description: Grants permission to create a datastore that can ingest and export FHIR data

DeleteFHIRDatastore.description: Grants permission to delete a datastore

DescribeFHIRBulkDeleteJob.description: Grants permission to describe a FHIR Bulk Delete Job

DescribeFHIRDatastore.description: Grants permission to get the properties associated with the FHIR datastore, including the datastore ID, datastore ARN, datastore name, datastore status, created at, datastore type version, and datastore endpoint

DescribeFHIRExportJob.description: Grants permission to display the properties of a FHIR export job, including the ID, ARN, name, and the status of the datastore

DescribeFHIRExportJobWithGet.description: Grants permission to display the properties of a FHIR export job, including the ID, ARN, name, and the status of the datastore with Get

DescribeFHIRImportJob.description: Grants permission to display the properties of a FHIR import job, including the ID, ARN, name, and the status of the datastore

ExpandValueSetWithGet.description: Grants permission to search and expand ValueSet resource

ExpandValueSetWithPost.description: Grants permission to search and expand ValueSet resource

GenerateDocumentWithGet.description: Grants permission to generate a clinical document resource

GenerateDocumentWithPost.description: Grants permission to generate a clinical document resource

GetCapabilities.description: Grants permission to get the capabilities of a FHIR datastore

GetExportedFile.description: Grants permission to access exported files from a FHIR Export job initiated with Get

GetHistoryByResourceId.description: Grants permission to read resource history

InquirePreAuthClaim.description: Grants permission to inquire about the status of a prior authorization Claim

ListFHIRDatastores.description: Grants permission to list all FHIR datastores that are in the user's account, regardless of datastore status

ListFHIRExportJobs.description: Grants permission to get a list of export jobs for the specified datastore

ListFHIRImportJobs.description: Grants permission to get a list of import jobs for the specified datastore

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to get a list of tags for the specified datastore

LookupCodeSystemWithGet.description: Grants permission to retrieve Codes for a CodeSystem resource

LookupCodeSystemWithPost.description: Grants permission to retrieve Codes for a CodeSystem resource

MemberAdd.description: Grants permission to attribute a member with a specific provider group

MemberMatch.description: Grants permission to enable cross-system patient matching

MemberRemove.description: Grants permission to remove a member from a group

PatchResource.description: Grants permission to patch a resource

ProcessBundle.description: Grants permission to bundle multiple resource operations

QuestionnairePackage.description: Grants permission to retrieve Questionnaire packages with dependency Library and ValueSet resources

RetrieveAttributionStatus.description: Grants permission to retrieve member attribution status

SearchEverything.description: Grants permission to search all resources related to a patient

SearchWithGet.description: Grants permission to search resources with GET method

SearchWithPost.description: Grants permission to search resources with POST method

StartFHIRBulkDeleteJob.description: Grants permission to begin a FHIR Bulk Delete Job

StartFHIRExportJob.description: Grants permission to begin a FHIR Export job

StartFHIRExportJobWithGet.description: Grants permission to begin a FHIR Export job with Get

StartFHIRExportJobWithPost.description: Grants permission to begin a FHIR Export job with Post

StartFHIRImportJob.description: Grants permission to begin a FHIR Import job

SubmitPreAuthClaim.description: Grants permission to submit a prior authorization Claim request

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a datastore

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags associated with a datastore

ValidateResource.description: Grants permission to validate a resource

VersionReadResource.description: Grants permission to read version of a resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
